subject: [PATCH v10 10/15] mm/userfaultfd: add RWP fault delivery and expose UFFDIO_REGISTER_MODE_RWP

2026-07-08.patch_summary: This patch adds read-write protection (RWP) fault delivery to the userfaultfd interface, allowing userspace to track and handle RWP faults. It introduces new functions to handle PTE and PMD faults, as well as hugetlb faults, and exposes a new UAPI command to register for RWP mode. The patch also updates various kernel files to support RWP fault delivery and userfaultfd interface changes.
